sections.paragraph:
Original: מעל

Transliteration: mâ‛al

Phonetic: maw-al'

BDB Definition:

  1. to act unfaithfully, act treacherously, transgress, commit a trespass
    1. (Qal) to act unfaithfully or treacherously
      1. against man
      2. against God
      3. against devoted thing
      4. against husband

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1230

Part(s) of speech: Verb
